/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libshp.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
